findings.description: ChunkingStrategy protocol is sync-only (src/services/chunking.py:122-135). All five existing strategies have synchronous `chunk()` methods returning `list[DocumentChunk]`. The plan's TreeIndexChunkingStrategy requires async LLM calls for node summarization (Phase 2, Task 2.4), but cannot make async calls through the sync protocol.
findings.resolution: Keep TreeIndexChunkingStrategy.chunk() sync for tree structure building only. Move LLM summarization to async post-processing in index_content(), following existing embedding pattern.
findings.resolved_in: design.md (LLM Node Summarization section), tasks.md (Task 2.4, 2.6), spec.md (Tree Index Strategy requirement), proposal.md (Design Decision #5)

findings.description: Tree search latency unspecified. No timeout, concurrency limit, or max-documents-per-tree-search constraint.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (Tree Search Retrieval requirement + 2 new scenarios), design.md (Tree Search Retrieval section), tasks.md (Task 3.2, 3.4, 3.6, 3.7), proposal.md (Design Decision #7)

findings.description: SearchResult has no reasoning field for tree search traces.
findings.resolution: Added tree_reasoning: str | None = None to SearchResult model.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (Tree Search Retrieval requirement + reasoning scenario), design.md (SearchResult Model Changes section), tasks.md (Task 3.5), proposal.md (Impact section)

findings.description: ChunkType enum change needs ALTER TYPE migration (PG gotcha).
findings.resolution: Reuse existing ChunkType.SECTION for summary nodes. No enum addition needed.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (reuse SECTION explicitly stated), design.md (No new ChunkType note), tasks.md (Task 2.1, 2.2 — explicit 'No ChunkType change'), proposal.md (Design Decision #6)

findings.description: Re-indexing behavior for tree-indexed content not specified.
findings.resolution: Added scenario: re-indexing deletes all flat + tree chunks, rebuilds both, CASCADE handles cleanup.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (Re-indexing tree-indexed content scenario), tasks.md (Task 2.7 test case)

findings.description: Node IDs in tree search prompt use raw DB integers, confusing for LLMs.
findings.resolution: Added compact sequential IDs (N001, N002) with mapping back to DB chunk IDs.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (Tree Search requirement step 2, compact IDs scenario), design.md (prompt example updated), tasks.md (Task 3.1, 3.3, 3.4, 3.7)

findings.description: Model config uses Settings fields instead of ModelStep enum pattern.
findings.resolution: Use ModelStep.TREE_SUMMARIZATION and ModelStep.TREE_SEARCH enum values with model_registry.yaml defaults.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (ModelStep references), design.md (ModelStep.TREE_SUMMARIZATION note), tasks.md (Task 2.3, 3.2 — explicit ModelStep + model_registry.yaml), proposal.md (Design Decision #8)

findings.description: Tree root vs flat chunk disambiguation unclear — both have parent_chunk_id=NULL.
findings.resolution: Flat chunks: tree_depth=NULL. Tree roots: tree_depth=0. tree_depth IS NOT NULL is the authoritative discriminator.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (disambiguation requirement + coexistence scenario), design.md (Content Type Routing section), tasks.md (Task 2.2, 3.3, 3.6)

findings.description: Chunk thinning would merge TABLE/CODE chunks, destroying semantic classification.
findings.resolution: TABLE and CODE chunks exempt from thinning. Only PARAGRAPH and SECTION types eligible.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (exempt requirement + 2 scenarios), tasks.md (Task 1.2, 1.3), proposal.md (Phase 1 description)

findings.description: Backfill command missing --force flag for staleness handling.
findings.resolution: Added --force flag: without it, skip content with existing tree chunks; with it, delete and rebuild.

findings.description: Node summarization is sequential — 10 calls for a 15-section paper.
findings.resolution: Parallelize sibling nodes at same depth via asyncio.gather(). Reduces to ~3-4 rounds.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (parallelization requirement), design.md (code example with asyncio.gather), tasks.md (Task 2.6, 2.7), cost analysis updated

findings.description: No observability spans for tree search LLM calls.
findings.resolution: Added telemetry span requirements for both summarization and search with specific metadata fields.
findings.resolved_in: spec.md (telemetry requirement in Tree Search Retrieval), design.md (Observability note), tasks.md (Task 2.6, 3.4)
